title: Officer Black Belt
tmdbOverview: A talented martial artist who can't walk past a person in need unites with a probation officer to fight and prevent crime as a martial arts officer.
synopsis: Officer Black Belt (2024) is a action, comedy and crime film from South Korea. It carries a 6.9 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
